movies.title: Soorarai Pottru
movies.story: An inspiring story of a man who dreams of making air travel affordable for the common people, fighting every obstacle in his path.

viewerReviews.name: Arun
viewerReviews.text: Most inspiring Tamil film of the decade. A must watch!

movies.title: Vikram
movies.cast: Kamal Haasan, Vijay Sethupathi, Fahadh Faasil
movies.story: A special agent investigates a series of masked killings, only to uncover a web far bigger and more dangerous than he imagined.

viewerReviews.name: Karthik
viewerReviews.text: Lokesh universe is on fire. Goosebumps throughout!

movies.title: Jai Bhim
movies.story: A lawyer fights a relentless legal battle for justice on behalf of a marginalised tribal family wronged by the system.
